textByHashes.6dad5db8ae9d3f5ed6f7581c1e492e4ddf97365e: Aghhh get that cat away from me. Quickly please.
textByHashes.6212fa73481996c4154e17be0589ec116c603340: Just take it away please. Take it away. If you do, I'll tell you of the secret passageway.
textByHashes.711f5eab08aff8f06d31368bf1b071936522cd9e: Get the cat away from me first and then I'll tell you.
textByHashes.38b55808e7a12984fdf3b393cf6761c824949f6c: It's by that group of rocks just to the north east, but you won't be able to enter. Well, not yet anyway...
textByHashes.4b47dfa0c32d0eeeb2b16545bf74350f7a1acf79: To Sophanem, the city of the dead.
textByHashes.4cd8e45781cb827a96502f8b6ab0342675ac8ef0: The second city of the Menaphites, full of giant monuments to their departed.
textByHashes.ba0a626a52d05edc9e0472df7b25b363e34fe41a: The place is locked down at the moment, so the passage is the only way in. Apparently, they've been hit by a set of plagues. That pathetic new High Priest of Icthlarin is probably to blame.
textByHashes.7fbd440440382b2258f0689d82c2ebabe3192b23: First bring me some supplies and then I'll tell you. I'm running low and I'm about to embark on a long journey.
textByHashes.4eebdedea60c3d0e037bcddc9e78c252a7287412: Get me a full waterskin and a tinderbox. I seem to have lost my own and these desert nights are very cold.
textByHashes.04f81911f9f1cf44f7b7f1af1c16821d6edd5269: Fool! Only I can give you the knowledge on the secret passageway!
textByHashes.c279ada73960450d5eec897165f4452d638c4b94: Get that cat away from me!
textByHashes.0b04340a625a5b37b517aa73b58dcef6a35e3a35: You again. Do you have my supplies?
textByHashes.3f1feaf238277b8c2c1a17e2813d388aadae75d9: Bring me a full waterskin and a tinderbox.
textByHashes.e4e9f8a8626452daf2fce142ca28236ab8b71920: Good... Now, look into my eyes...
textByHashes.b002b85ce5306a98f6c13593b0e9689fe5a33ee7: You have done well, adventurer. All my brother's dogs in one place, with no one around to save them.
